text:
retirement, point where a person chooses to permanently leave the workforce, also known as retirement and disability pension, retiring. Attributes include: 
- subclass of: "termination of employment"
- Commons category: "Retirement"
- has cause: "age of a person",
 "disability",
 "windfall gain"
- different from: "resignation",
 "dismissal"
- role of agent(s) of action: "worker"
- objects of occurrence have role: "worker"
